g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do gym checkin events get produced to Kafka in FitStream?')
sendPrompt('How does the TS event simulator produce realistic checkin events?')
sendPrompt('Why Kafka and not BullMQ? What partitioning strategy does FitStream use?')
g.text: Partitioned by user_id → ordered per user

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the member profile updater consumer work in FitStream?')
sendPrompt('What does the gym-level stats aggregation consumer compute?')
sendPrompt('What does the member profile look like in Redis?')
sendPrompt('What does PostgreSQL store in FitStream?')
sendPrompt('How does the content-based recommendation ranking algorithm work in FitStream?')
g.text: Content-based ranking: affinity × time × facility match

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What REST endpoints does the FitStream NestJS API expose?')
sendPrompt('What does /health and /metrics expose in FitStream?')
sendPrompt('How does the /explain endpoint use LangChain to justify a recommendation?')
g.text: Why this class? Profile + scores → plain-English justification
